since_last: 64% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +8.20%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC +1.63% · Gold +1.90% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 64% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +8.20%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +8.20%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.92%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +25.93%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +25.93%, CBRS +16.75%, SKHY +14.55%, MU +13.78%, OKLO +12.45%. Laggards: OKTA -4.95%, CHKP -4.79%, MDB -4.72%, WDAY -4.53%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.38% at $125.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
